course_title: LITERATURA DE LA EDAD MEDIA CASTELLANA (SS. XII-XV)
description: The study of a particular author, work, topic, or literary genre of the Middle Ages and/or Early Renaissance (through15th century): Poema de mio Cid, mester de juglaria, Libro de buen amor, mester de clerecia, El conde Lucanor, La Celestina, etc.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: SPANISH 223and224. Graduate students may not enroll
